tweets.text:
At my confirmation hearing last March, I noted that President Trump’s historic return to the White House was fueled by the hardworking men and women of America who were looking for a leader to put them First.

In his first year alone, President Trump has more than delivered on that promise. 

Under his leadership, all net job growth has gone to Native-Born Workers, @USDOL is making significant investments in our workforce, and we’re working around the clock to ensure American Jobs go to American Workers.

There’s a lot more to do this year, but we’re making progress — and we’re never going to stop fighting for the American People 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
I am shocked and devastated by the passing of my friend and former colleague, Congressman Doug LaMalfa. 

Doug was a committed representative who always put the needs of his constituents first and served California with honor and dignity. He will be deeply missed. 

My prayers are with his family during this difficult time.

President Trump has done more to deliver for both Labor and Industry than any President in decades.

He’s breaking the status quo by advocating for regulations that spur private innovation while pushing for fair trade, workplace safety protections, and America First policies that protect our Workers. 

Under his leadership, we’re not taking our foot off the gas. 

In 2026, we will continue unleashing American innovation, restoring American Industrial dominance, and putting our Workers FIRST 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸
